projects.name: nullclaw
projects.description: Fastest, smallest, and fully autonomous AI assistant infrastructure written in Zig
projects.summary_zh: 极致轻量的生产级AI助手基础设施 | Zig实现的性能标杆
projects.summary_en: Production-grade ultra-lightweight AI assistant infrastructure | Zig performance benchmark

highlights_zh: 678KB静态二进制 + ~1MB内存 + <2ms启动，极致资源效率
Zig语言原生安全：零运行时依赖、严格内存管理、强类型系统
vtable插件架构：50+providers、19channels、35+tools全可替换
多层安全沙箱：landlock/firejail/bubblewrap/docker + workspace隔离
highlights_en: 678KB static binary + ~1MB RAM + <2ms boot —极致资源效率
Native Zig safety: zero runtime deps, strict memory management, strong typing
vtable plugin architecture: 50+providers, 19channels, 35+tools all swappable
Multi-layer sandboxing: landlock/firejail/bubblewrap/docker + workspace isolation
concerns_zh: Zig语言生态相对年轻，第三方库生态不如Rust/Python成熟
异步编程模式和错误处理需要深入理解Zig的编译期特性和定位系统
concerns_en: Zig ecosystem is relatively young with less mature third-party library ecosystem than Rust/Python
Async programming patterns and error handling require deep understanding of Zig's comptime features and comptime duck typing
